CreateAuthGroup.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
CreateAuthGroup.instanceId: ID of the associated rapidFS instance
CreateAuthGroup.description: Description of the permission group instance
CreateAuthGroup.authInfos: List of permissions for the auth group to be created (see AuthInfo in appendix). If no rule with cidr "0.0.0.0/0" is included, the backend will **additionally** create a default rule: { cidr: "0.0.0.0/0", mode: "ReadWrite", description: "allow read/write in default, cannot be deleted" }
CreateAuthGroup.authInfos.cidr: Permission address, IP or CIDR block. Must be valid, e.g.: 127.0.0.1, 127.0.0.0/28
CreateAuthGroup.authInfos.mode: Permission type. Enum: * ReadOnly: read-only; * ReadWrite: read and write; * Forbid: access denied
